overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of an industrial ship or offshore platform during a stormy night. The player moves from an open rain-slicked deck into a narrow, dimly lit interior corridor, showcasing high-quality game engine graphics with realistic wet surface reflections and atmospheric lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-slicked deck of a ship, approaching a narrow passage

notable_agents.action: worker in orange safety coveralls standing near the railing, facing the ocean

entered.detail: white painted metal wall of the ship's superstructure with visible panel seams
black metal safety railing along the edge of the deck
dark choppy ocean water visible beyond the railing under stormy night skies
circular yellow deck hatch with black safety markings on red floor
bright orange life preserver ring mounted on the superstructure wall
metal staircase with safety rails leading up the side of the superstructure
overhead metal awning providing partial cover over the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on the rain-slicked deck of an industrial ship during a stormy night. The camera moves forward along the white superstructure wall, passing a worker in orange safety gear standing near the railing. The red deck features yellow hatches and an orange life preserver, while the stormy ocean is visible beyond the railing to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow interior walkway between ship structures

events.description: entering narrow enclosed walkway from the open deck, transitioning from exposed to sheltered environment
passing under a fluorescent wall light fixture, briefly illuminating the dark corridor

agents.ego_description: proceeding through a dark narrow corridor with metal walkways, moving toward a distant light at the end

entered.detail: dark metal wall of the narrow interior passage
smooth dark wall on the right side of the enclosed walkway
metal safety handrail running along the left side of the corridor
industrial pipes and conduits running along the ceiling of the corridor
fluorescent light fixture mounted on the left wall providing artificial illumination
faint light visible at the far end of the dark corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow, dimly lit corridor between ship structures, leaving the stormy deck behind. The space is enclosed with dark metal walls, interior handrails, and overhead pipework. The player walks toward a distant light at the end of the corridor, passing under a fluorescent wall fixture that casts stark light on the wet metal surfaces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the exposed, rain-lashed deck of an industrial ship into the claustrophobic confines of a dimly lit interior corridor. It begins by gliding along a white superstructure wall on a red deck, passing a worker in orange safety gear and yellow hatches while the stormy ocean churns beyond the railing. As the camera moves forward, the open environment abruptly shifts as it enters a narrow passage between dark metal structures, leaving the wind and rain behind. The scene then tightens into an enclosed space of overhead pipework and interior handrails, where the lighting transitions from the dark storm to the stark glow of a fluorescent wall fixture. Finally, the camera advances through the corridor, following the reflections on wet metal surfaces toward a distant light at the end of the hall.
